content.en:
"These three top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses are not simple!"

Ye Tian's face changed slightly.

They should all have reached the limit of the top Ancient Demon level powerhouse, only one step away from the peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse, and the ultimate rule realm has reached the peak realm of Xiaocheng, and they have also practiced the form secret method, and they have all reached the fourth form.

It can be said that their combat power is undoubtedly the first grade of the top ancient demon-level powerhouses.

"It seems that I have recently killed a lot of ancient demon-level powerhouses, which has attracted the attention of these tribes, so I have sent three such powerful top-level ancient demon-level powerhouses to surround and kill me!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He didn't choose to call for help, and even if he did, it was unlikely that the top Gu Demon-level powerhouse of the Aromu Fortress would come to support him, for fear that it would be a trap and fall away.

As for asking for help from the Stygian Ancient Demon, it is not appropriate.

"Then let's fight!"

Ye Tian's four form secret methods all burst out, and the five ultimate rule realms shrouded in.

Moreover, he urged the pinnacle ultimate arcane armor of the Arrow Mother and the golden light of the Arrow Mother with all his might, and collided with these three top ancient demon-level powerhouses in an instant 960.

Thundered!!!!

The collision of the realm of the ultimate rules with the realm of the ultimate rules, the collision of the pinnacle of the arcane with the pinnacle of the arcane.

Fortunately, with the body of time and space and the secret method of time and space form, most of the attacks can be low-key, otherwise Ye Tian is afraid that his body will be crushed in an instant.

"How could it be !!"

Duohe Ancient Demon, one of the three top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, was extremely shocked, he was an extremely powerful top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and he thought that his combat power could at least rank in the top twenty combat power of the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses among the three hundred and sixty-five main divisions.

I don't know how many top Gu Demon-level powerhouses died in his hands, but I didn't expect that I couldn't easily kill Ye Tian.

Before, the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses asked him to unite with two other ancient demon-level powerhouses to besiege Ye Tian, and he was still a little angry, feeling that the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses looked down on him.

In his opinion, he alone was enough to easily kill Ye Tian in seconds.

Now, he knew that he had underestimated Ye Tian.

This is simply too demonic, it is only an ordinary ancient demon-level realm, and it has mastered such a powerful ultimate rule realm, and it is still five, and he has also created several form secret methods, and all of them have been cultivated to the fourth form, and he has also created many peak ultimate arcane arts.

Could it be that Ye Tian is the doppelganger of a pinnacle ancient demon-level powerhouse, otherwise why would he be so demonic!

As time passed, although Ye Tian's injuries gradually worsened, these three top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses were also injured, and there were other top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses approaching.

If they continue to fight, they all have the possibility of being killed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian seized an opportunity, burst out with all his strength, broke through the encirclement, shocked them with five Ultimate Rule Realms, and suppressed their speed, and then quickly cast the Golden Light of Aromu and fled.

Suddenly.

Another top ancient demon-level powerhouse intercepted Ye Tian, obviously seeing that Ye Tian's injury was not light, he wanted to kill Ye Tian and pick up a bargain.

However, he overestimated his own strength and underestimated Ye Tian's strength.

"Aromu Sword Light!"

A sword light pierced through the opponent's body and directly hit it hard.

Immediately after, the five Ultimate Rule Realms directly suppressed down, crushing the opponent's body and killing it.

Seeing this scene, many top ancient demon-level powerhouses trembled and didn't dare to make a move.

After all, Ye Tian can easily kill a top ancient demon-level powerhouse, maybe he can kill them, even if Ye Tian falls in the end, but if they themselves fall, they will not be able to get any benefits, and if they fall, they will really fall, who would dare to do it!

However, there were quite a few top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in the vicinity, and suddenly more than a dozen top-level Ancient Demon (DBDJ)-level powerhouses combined into a battle array, turning into an incomparably huge Ancient Demon with one hand.

Ye Tian didn't entangle with him, and after fighting with him, he quickly fled.

After that, Ye Tian kept fleeing, and finally fled back to the Arrow Mu Fortress.

After coming back, Ye Tian pretended to heal his injuries, but in fact directly changed to a replica body.

However, after this battle, Ye Tian's reputation became even louder.

After all, the three top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who fought against him were all well-known existences in this era, and they didn't leave Ye Tian behind, which showed how terrifying Ye Tian's strength was.

......

"Heaven actually retreated under the siege of the three top ancient demon-level powerhouses of Duohe Ancient Demon, this strength is too terrifying, no wonder you can obtain so much luck power!"

The Ancient Demon of Stygian Ya was looking forward to Ye Tian even more, this strength was too demonic, much more demonic than Amusha.

And Ye Tian is not a member of the main clan of the mother of Aluo, and the possibility of breaking through the ultimate ancient demon in the future is almost zero, but he can be won over by her, and even serve her, becoming her most effective thug.

After a short period of time, Ye Tian left the Arrow Mu Fortress again, and this time he went out with his identity hidden.

After that, he quickly killed the other main Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and when he was discovered, he had already killed many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

In the following years, he went out again and again to attack and kill the ancient demon-level powerhouses of other main departments, most of which were ordinary ancient demon-level powerhouses, but there were also many top-level ancient demon-level powerhouses.

Of course, he was often attacked and killed, but every time he managed to escape, sometimes he was even close to death, but he could recover in a short time.

In the blink of an eye, many ancient demon eras have passed.

At this time, the battle for the luck of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space was halfway through, and at this time, almost all of them were fights between top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, and even the number of shots of the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses was relatively frequent.

Several times, Ye Tian was almost caught by a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse, but he received a notice from the Stygian Ancient Demon in time and quickly withdrew, so he was not caught by a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse.

this day.

Ye Tian found that his luck power had reached 100,000 parts, so he came to find the Stygian Ancient Demon for the first time.

......

"Lord Stygian Ancient Demon, I have obtained 100,000 pieces of Qi Luck Power, can I exchange it for an Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" The Stygian Ancient Demon agreed, and immediately she absorbed the power of Ye Tian's space-time Ancient Demon Pillar's luck, and then handed over an Ultimate Ancient Demon Inheritance to Ye Tian.

"This is the ultimate ancient demon inheritance of Lord Aroye, the main department of our Aro Mother, and I paid a great price to get it. "

The Ancient Demon Path.

"Thank you, Lord Stygian!"
